tldr: The user did not reach the High-Value Action due to a critical error that prevented the onboarding process from starting. The onboarding experience is critically broken as the user encountered a FileNotFoundError immediately, halting any progress.
narrative: The Busy Parent persona attempted to start the onboarding process but was immediately blocked by a critical error. This prevented any further interaction, resulting in a failed session with no progress towards the High-Value Action.
bright_spots: The product's promise of automating website growth is appealing to time-constrained users like Busy Parent.

observations.observation: The user encountered a FileNotFoundError immediately upon attempting to start the onboarding process, preventing any further interaction.

recommendations.recommendation: Resolve the FileNotFoundError by ensuring all necessary files and directories are correctly configured and accessible during the onboarding process.
recommendations.evidence: The user was blocked at Step 1 due to a FileNotFoundError, halting all progress.

recommendations.recommendation: Implement robust error handling to provide users with informative messages and alternative actions when a critical error occurs.
recommendations.evidence: The session ended abruptly due to a FileNotFoundError with no guidance for the user.

recommendations.recommendation: Ensure the landing page has a clear and immediate call-to-action that guides users into the onboarding flow smoothly, even if technical issues arise.
recommendations.evidence: The user was unable to proceed past the landing page due to a technical error.

next_steps: Fix the FileNotFoundError to ensure the onboarding flow can be initiated.
Implement error handling mechanisms to guide users when technical issues occur.
Conduct a technical audit to identify and resolve any other potential file access issues.
Run a new user session with the Busy Parent persona after resolving the error to test the onboarding flow.
Review the landing page to ensure it effectively directs users into the onboarding process.
persona_impact: The Busy Parent persona's low technical literacy and need for efficiency were critically impacted by the immediate technical error. A more tech-savvy user might have attempted troubleshooting, but this persona is likely to abandon the process when faced with such a barrier.
